# btpservice_cicd_credential_basic_auth (Resource)

Manages a Basic Authentication credential in the SAP BTP CI/CD service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "btpservice_cicd_credential_basic_auth" "example" {
  name        = "my-deploy-user-from-cicd"
  description = "CF deployment user1"
  username    = "deploy-user@example.com"
  password    = "passoword"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Credential name. Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for basic authentication. Not returned by the API on reads — stored only in Terraform state.
- `username` (String) Username for basic authentication.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional human-readable description.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the resource (assigned by the API).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# terraform import btpservice_cicd_credential_basic_auth.<resource_name> <id>

terraform import btpservice_cicd_credential_basic_auth.parent dd005d8b-1fee-4e6b-b6ff-cb9a197b7fe0
```
